subject: Mathematics
title: Least Common Multiple
description: A short lesson to help you apply Least Common Multiple.

hook.text: Two traffic lights blink at different speeds. When will they flash together?

buildup.text: The least common multiple is the smallest number both values divide into evenly.

discovery.text: The LCM of 4 and 6 is 12. Both 4 and 6 fit evenly into 12.

twist.text: Shortcut: multiply the two numbers and divide by their GCD to get the LCM.

climax.text: LCMs schedule bus routes, sync machine gears, and align musical rhythms.

punchline.text: Math predicts when different cycles will align.

quiz.question: What is the LCM of 4 and 6?
